finding: Integrin beta-4 is a cancer stem cell marker; preclinical bispecific/immunotherapy targeting (breast/HNSCC), no gastric-specific ADC yet
implication: Genuine surface target but broadly expressed in normal epithelium (hemidesmosomes); selectivity caveat

finding: MHC class II beta chain; immune-cell restricted; no bulk tumor expression in TCGA-STAD (median TPM 0)
implication: Thin-evidence (Surf+T only, 4 missing components); immune gene, not epithelial tumor target

finding: MHC class II beta chain; immune-cell restricted; non-assessable bulk expression
implication: Thin-evidence renormalization artifact; Watchlist by rule

finding: Killer-cell immunoglobulin-like receptor; NK-cell restricted; non-assessable bulk expression
implication: Thin-evidence; immune/NK gene, not epithelial tumor target

finding: Killer-cell immunoglobulin-like receptor; NK-cell restricted; non-assessable bulk expression
implication: Thin-evidence; immune/NK gene, not epithelial tumor target

finding: P-cadherin: tumor-associated antigen overexpressed in gastric/colorectal/pancreatic, low in many normal tissues; ADC PCA062, radioimmunotherapy, pCAD x CDH17 bispecific ADC
implication: Strong Tier 1 candidate; established TAA with ADC precedent and favorable window

finding: Oncogenic in gastric cancer (proliferation/migration, poor survival); proposed surface target in amplified regions
implication: Tumor-cell evidence exists, but bulk high purity-adjusted TME flag requires cell-resolution before Tier 1

finding: Integrin beta-5 overexpressed in gastric cancer, promotes TGFb-driven EMT/metastasis, correlates with immune infiltrates
implication: Genuine GC biology but high purity-adjusted TME flag and broad expression; Tier 2 pending cell-resolution

finding: CD112/Nectin-2: immune-checkpoint ligand (PVRIG/TIGIT axis), upregulated in cancers; anti-Nectin-2 mAb with ADCC; ADC in ovarian xenografts
implication: Genuine antibody/ADC target with good Ig ECD; caveat: also on antigen-presenting cells, liver normal expression

finding: Tetherin/CD317 overexpressed in gastric cancer vs adjacent normal, correlates with stage/metastasis; anti-BST2 mAb ADCC (myeloma)
implication: Genuine target but pipeline flags protein_present_no_membrane discordance and hematopoietic risk; Tier 2

finding: Interferon-gamma receptor 1: ubiquitous cytokine receptor on essentially all nucleated cells; gastric risk polymorphism
implication: High purity-adjusted TME flag and ubiquitous expression preclude tumor selectivity; Tier 2 with strong caveat

finding: CEA: classical tumor antigen, ADC programs (tusamitamab ravtansine, labetuzumab govitecan); positive control
implication: Tier 1 by rule; caveat: apical/normal GI epithelial expression requires specificity review

finding: Jagged1 Notch ligand: overexpressed in gastric cancer (miR-142 axis), oncogenic; neutralizing mAbs developed
implication: Tier 1 by rule; caveat: Notch ligand broadly expressed including vasculature/stroma

finding: Pan-epithelial surface antigen; catumaxomab history; positive control with preregistered normal-expression penalty
implication: Tier 1 by rule but loud caveat: high normal epithelial expression (on-target/off-tumor toxicity)

finding: HPA: cancer tissues mainly negative; distinct expression in endothelial cells and smooth muscle; positive staining reflects vascular/endothelial cells not tumor epithelium
implication: A-priori expectation (2026-05-31) CONFIRMED: vascular staining, not tumor-cell membranous -> Watchlist by preregistered TME rule

finding: ALPG/ALPPL2 placental alkaline phosphatase: oncofetal antigen virtually absent from normal adult tissue except placenta; aberrant in gastric/ovarian/germ-cell; ADC and ALPP/G x CD3 bispecific (ATG-112) programs
implication: Excellent therapeutic window biologically, but pipeline flags single_layer_dependency -> Tier 2 (promising, ranking fragile)

finding: Common gamma chain: lymphoid/hematopoietic cytokine receptor subunit; pipeline RNA_high_protein_absent discordance and hematopoietic risk
implication: Immune/lymphoid lineage, not an epithelial tumor target; Watchlist

finding: Desmocollin-2: desmosomal cadherin; literature reports DOWNregulation in gastric cancer with progression (tumor-suppressor-like), only DSC isoform in normal stomach
implication: Poor tumor-normal window (downregulated in tumor); single_layer_dependent; Tier 2 with negative-window caveat

finding: RANK: bone-metabolism receptor; denosumab targets the LIGAND (RANKL), not RANK; limited gastric surface-target rationale
implication: Single_layer_dependent; weak gastric-specific antibody rationale; Tier 2

finding: HER2: established gastric/GEJ benchmark (trastuzumab ToGA; trastuzumab deruxtecan approved 2L); membranous companion-Dx IHC; positive control
implication: Pipeline stability top20-freq 0.34 < 0.40 -> Tier 2 by rule (NOT forced to Tier 1); robust top50, established benchmark, heterogeneity-consistent

finding: MHC class I: ubiquitous; plan rule says HLA is not a conventional antibody target without specific modality; protein_missing flag
implication: Watchlist: HLA, not a conventional epithelial tumor target

finding: LRRC15: TGFb-induced mesenchymal/CAF marker; ABBV-085 ADC targets it ON STROMAL fibroblasts, not tumor epithelium
implication: Curation-identified stromal/CAF compartment marker (analogous to PECAM1) -> Watchlist; second bulk/TME compartment false positive

finding: MHC class II: immune/antigen-presenting; ubiquitous immune expression; high purity-adjusted TME flag
implication: Watchlist: HLA/immune, not a conventional epithelial tumor target

finding: Butyrophilin 3A3: immune modulator (gamma-delta T cell biology); immune compartment
implication: Watchlist: immune butyrophilin, not epithelial tumor target

finding: Tetraspanin CD9: four-pass membrane protein, short extracellular loops (pipeline accessibility class C), broadly expressed, EV marker
implication: Class C ECD limits antibody accessibility; fails stability; Tier 2 with ECD caveat

finding: Lipolysis-stimulated lipoprotein receptor (angulin, tricellular tight junction): overexpressed in gastric primary/metastatic tumors not normal, poor prognosis; anti-LSR mAb and ADC
implication: Favorable literature window, but pipeline fails stability and flags high TME; tight-junction accessibility caveat; Tier 2

finding: NKG2D ligand: stress-induced, immune-recognition ligand, known shedding/soluble forms
implication: Watchlist: immune ligand with shedding/soluble-decoy risk, not a clean epithelial target

finding: Cadherin-17 (LI-cadherin): GI-restricted (small intestine/colon), overexpressed in 73.6% gastric cancer vs 37% adjacent; CAR-T CHM-2101 phase 1/2 and ADC programs; reported as a favorable GI surface-antigen program
implication: Clinical-stage GI surface-antigen context, but ranks 28 in bulk surfaceome and fails stability top20-freq -> Tier 2 (bulk ranking conservative vs external evidence)

finding: CD47 'don't eat me' macrophage checkpoint, prognostic in gastric cancer, but ubiquitous including erythrocytes; multiple anti-CD47 drugs terminated for hematologic toxicity (CC-90002, SFR231)
implication: Watchlist: ubiquitous expression with disqualifying RBC/hematologic toxicity

finding: TGF-beta receptor 1: ubiquitous signaling receptor; high purity-adjusted TME flag; fails stability
implication: Tier 2: broadly expressed signaling receptor, no tumor selectivity, TME-flagged
